hero.title: AI Pet Photo
hero.description: Create warm, realistic portraits of you and your pet in a single frame. Ideal for pet-focused social content, adoption profiles, brand ads, and family moments across TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.
hero.upload_instruction: Upload media to apply this template.
hero.image_prompt_before: A clean, naturally lit portrait of a young woman sitting on a cozy sofa in a modern living room. She wears a soft sweater and smiles gently at the camera. No animals are present. The scene is crisp, unedited, and photorealistic.
hero.image_prompt_after: The same woman on the sofa, now with a fluffy golden retriever resting its head on her lap. Both look at the camera with gentle, content expressions. The lighting is soft and warm, creating a seamless, natural pet-owner portrait.

what_it_is.title: What makes a AI Pet Photo video work?
what_it_is.intro: The AI Pet Photo effect blends your photo with a pet photo into a single, natural-looking portrait. It relies on matching lighting, framing, and positioning to create a warm, believable scene. For best results, use clear, front-facing shots with minimal background clutter.

cards.title: High-Quality Portraits
cards.description: Start with sharp, well-lit photos of you and your pet facing the camera. Avoid heavy shadows or cluttered backgrounds so the AI blends both subjects cleanly.

cards.title: Natural Poses & Expressions
cards.description: Position yourself and your pet in calm, affectionate poses. The AI recognizes eye contact and gentle interaction, resulting in a cohesive, candid look.

cards.title: Seamless AI Blending
cards.description: The effect uses advanced alignment and lighting matching to merge the two photos into one frame, preserving texture and depth for a realistic, photo-like finish.

cards.title: Short-Form Social Appeal
cards.description: Warm, pet-human moments drive high engagement on TikTok, Reels, and ads. This effect creates shareable content that feels authentic and emotionally resonant.

application_scenarios.title: Application Scenarios
application_scenarios.description: Real examples of how creators apply the AI Pet Photo effect to produce natural, heartwarming person-and-pet portraits across different channels.

scenarios.title: Social Pet Influencer Content
scenarios.description: Style consistent, affectionate post photos of you and your dog or cat for Instagram and TikTok.
scenarios.image_prompt: A cozy living room scene with warm sunlight streaming through windows. A young woman with a gentle smile sits on a rug, arm around a golden retriever; both look at the camera. Soft blankets, plants, and a coffee mug create an inviting atmosphere. The image feels authentic and unposed, capturing the bond between them.

scenarios.title: Adoption Profile Portraits
scenarios.description: Help shelter animals connect with potential families by showing them with a caring human companion.
scenarios.image_prompt: A bright, minimal backdrop of a modern adoption center. A staff member in a branded polo shirt kneels beside a mixed-breed dog wearing a bandana. The person looks down at the dog with a kind expression, while the dog gazes happily toward the camera. Clean, uplifting, and reassuring mood.

scenarios.title: Custom Holiday Pet Cards
scenarios.description: Design festive greeting cards featuring you and your pet in a single, polished photo.
scenarios.image_prompt: A wintry scene outside a log cabin, with soft snow falling. A man in a red sweater stands next to a small fluffy cat in a tiny festive collar, both facing forward. Twinkling lights wrap around a wooden fence in the background, and a tasteful 'Happy Holidays' text placeholder floats subtly at the bottom. The photo feels candid yet professionally composed.

faqs.question: What is the AI Pet Photo effect?
faqs.answer: It's a tool that uses AI to create realistic, warm photos of you and your pet together. Upload images and the effect blends them into a single portrait-style image with natural lighting and poses.

faqs.question: Why is AI Pet Photo useful for TikTok, Reels, or Shorts?
faqs.answer: The effect generates eye-catching visual content that shows the bond with your pet. It's perfect for short video platforms where expressive, personal images help increase engagement and shares.

faqs.question: Can I create an AI Pet Photo from one uploaded image?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can. The AI can work with a single photo of your pet or yourself, though using two source images—one of you and one of your pet—often gives more accurate blending and composition.

faqs.question: What kind of image works best with this effect?
faqs.answer: Clear, well-lit photos with visible faces and neutral backgrounds produce the best results. Avoid heavy shadows, blur, or objects covering the face or body for optimal blending quality.

faqs.question: Can I use AI Pet Photo for product, fashion, travel, or creator content?
faqs.answer: Yes, the effect is versatile. Creators use it to humanize pet brands, add a personal touch to travel posts, or create relatable fashion and lifestyle content featuring pet companionship.

cta.headline: Create AI pet portraits from a photo, prompt, or template
cta.supporting_text: Upload a pet photo, describe what you want, or pick a template — and get a custom AI pet image in moments.

other_names.title: Other names for AI Pet Photo
other_names.description: When searching for this effect, you might use different terms like pet portrait generator or animated pet picture. LazyKiwi helps you turn these ideas into short-video-ready visuals, bringing your furry friends to life with stunning AI-driven styles.
